changes.description: Added _build_candidate_pairs() inverted-index function; replaced O(n^2) nested loop with candidate pair iteration
Added test_sparse_large_graph_coupling: 50 nodes with sparse connectivity, validates 3 expected coupled pairs

verification.command: PYTHONPATH=.cnogo python3 -c "from scripts.context.phases.coupling import compute_coupling, CouplingResult, _build_candidate_pairs"
